4.reason: [Error: 'MaxV' is used before it is defined. The #define MaxV 256 appears later, so the compiler does not know what MaxV is at this point.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: 'MaxV' is used before it is defined. The #define MaxV 256 appears later, so the compiler does not know what MaxV is at this point.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [MaxV is not defined yet; it is defined later with #define MaxV 256, but the array declaration uses it before the macro definition. Move the #define before this line or move the array declaration after the #define.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  'MaxV' used before definition; define MaxV before this line.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [MaxV is defined later; usage before definition causes compilation error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Compilation Error: 'MaxV' is used before it is defined. The macro '#define MaxV 256' appears later in the code, causing an undeclared identifier error.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Compilation Error: 'MaxV' is used before it is defined. The macro '#define MaxV 256' appears later in the code.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The macro MaxV is used before it is defined. In C, identifiers must be defined before use. This causes a compilation error.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [MaxV is used before its definition; move #define MaxV 256 before this line]
